ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_a3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "iso_a2" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "gdp_usd" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product in US dollars */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" TEXT /* GDP growth rate in percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Unemployment rate in percentage */,
  "inflation_rate" TEXT /* Inflation rate in percentage */,
  "life_expectancy" TEXT /* Average life expectancy in years */,
  "education_index" TEXT /* Education index */,
  "health_index" TEXT /* Health index */,
  "hdi" TEXT /* Human Development Index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the continent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the continent data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "world_bank_region" TEXT /* World Bank region classification */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the income group (e.g., Low income, Upper middle income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the income group data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economies" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economy (e.g., Emerging, Advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the economy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_economic_classifications" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income group */,
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "income_group_id", "economy_id")
)
column_names: Three-letter ISO code for the country
Two-letter ISO code for the country
Reference to the continent where the country is located
Area of the country in square kilometers
Gross Domestic Product in US dollars
Last update timestamp for the country data
